mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tcm_diagnosis ( patient_id, doctor_id, doctor_name, diagnosis_date, main_complaint, tongue_description, tongue_image_url, pulse_description, tcm_summary, physical_exam, lifestyle, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{diagnosisDate}, #{mainComplaint}, #{tongueDescription}, #{tongueImageUrl}, #{pulseDescription}, #{tcmSummary}, #{physicalExam}, #{lifestyle}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tcm_diagnosis SET doctor_id = #{doctorId}, doctor_name = #{doctorName}, diagnosis_date = #{diagnosisDate}, main_complaint = #{mainComplaint}, tongue_description = #{tongueDescription}, tongue_image_url = #{tongueImageUrl}, pulse_description = #{pulseDescription}, tcm_summary = #{tcmSummary}, physical_exam = #{physicalExam}, lifestyle = #{lifestyle}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tcm_diagnosis WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY diagnosis_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM tcm_diagnosis WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY diagnosis_date DESC LIMIT 1
